prompt: I need to write a unit test for DaemonConsoleView that verifies daemon JSON events ([{"event":"app.log",...}]) are filtered from console output, while regular text lines are displayed. The test should not start a real Flutter process. Show me the test class, how to set up the fake process handler, how to simulate stdout events, and how to assert what ended up in the console.

assertions.text: Uses NopProcessHandler (or similar fake process handler) rather than a real process
Extends BasePlatformTestCase, LightPlatformTestCase, or another appropriate IntelliJ test base class
Uses handler.notifyTextAvailable() or equivalent to simulate stdout events arriving
Calls UIUtil.dispatchAllInvocationEvents(), PlatformTestUtil.dispatchAllEventsInIdeEventQueue(), or equivalent to flush EDT before asserting
Asserts that JSON daemon event lines do NOT appear in the console output
Asserts that regular (non-JSON) text lines DO appear in the console output
